hero.title: A Culinary Bridge from East to West
hero.description: For over 30 years, we have served traditional flavors with craftsmanship, quality and a warm family atmosphere.

story.title: Since 1995...
story.description: With decades of experience and an unwavering passion for authentic flavors, we continue to welcome our guests with the same quality, traditional recipes and warm family atmosphere.
story.platformsTitle: You can also find us on online food delivery platforms

reviews.title: Our guests tell the story of our flavor
reviews.description: For years, we have worked to preserve the same quality, warmth and authentic taste. Our most valuable reference is the satisfaction of our guests.

first.name: Ahmet K.
first.comment: The kebabs are delicious, the service is fast and the atmosphere is very suitable for families.

second.name: Merve A.
second.comment: Their pides and grilled dishes are truly successful. A reliable choice in Esenyurt.

third.name: Serkan T.
third.comment: One of the rare restaurants that has kept the same quality for years. Especially the meat dishes are excellent.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: The protection of your personal data and your privacy is important to us.

sections.heading: 1. General Information
sections.body: {{restaurantName}} values the privacy of its customers' and website visitors' personal data. This policy has been prepared to inform you about the personal data processed when you visit our website, use the QR menu, place an online order, make a reservation, or contact us.

sections.heading: 2. Data Controller
sections.body: Personal data collected through this website is processed by {{restaurantName}} as the data controller within the scope of applicable legislation.

sections.heading: 3. Personal Data Collected
sections.body:
Depending on the services provided, the following information may be processed:

• Name and surname
• Phone number
• Email address
• Delivery address
• Order information
• Reservation information
• Table number (for QR orders)
• Customer notes
• Technical usage data (IP address, browser information, device type, visit time)

sections.heading: 4. Method of Data Collection
sections.body: Your personal data is collected electronically through website forms, the online ordering system, QR menu, reservation screens, contact forms, and other digital channels provided by you.

sections.heading: 5. Purposes of Data Processing
sections.body:
The personal data collected may be used for the following purposes:

• Preparation of orders
• Order delivery
• Reservation management
• Fulfillment of customer requests
• Order status notifications
• Providing customer support
• Improving service quality
• Maintaining security records
• Fulfillment of legal obligations

sections.heading: 6. QR Menu Usage
sections.body: During QR Menu usage, only technical information necessary for providing the service is processed. In cases where a table order is placed, the table number may be associated with the order.

sections.heading: 7. Online Ordering Service
sections.body: When you place an online order, your name, contact information, delivery address, and order details are processed for the purposes of preparing and delivering the order and contacting you when necessary.

sections.heading: 8. Reservation Service
sections.body: If you make a reservation, your name, phone number, reservation date, number of guests, and other required information may be processed for the purpose of managing the reservation.

sections.heading: 9. Cookies
sections.body: Cookies may be used on our website to enhance the user experience and ensure the secure operation of the system. Detailed information about cookie usage can be found in our Cookie Policy.

sections.heading: 10. Analytical Data
sections.body: Anonymous usage statistics may be collected to improve the performance of the website. This data is not used to directly identify you.

sections.heading: 11. Data Retention Period
sections.body: Personal data is retained only for as long as the processing purpose continues or for the period specified in applicable legislation. Upon expiry, it is securely deleted, anonymized, or destroyed.

sections.heading: 12. Data Sharing
sections.body: Your personal data may be shared with payment institutions, delivery services, technical infrastructure providers, or authorized official authorities only to the extent necessary for the provision of the service. Beyond this, it is not sold to or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.heading: 13. Data Security
sections.body: {{restaurantName}} applies up-to-date technical and administrative measures to ensure the security of personal data. Necessary security measures are taken against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, and alteration.

sections.heading: 14. User Rights
sections.body:
Within the scope of applicable legislation, you have the right to:

• Learn about the data processed about you,
• Request correction of incomplete or inaccurate data,
• Request deletion of data,
• Object to processing,
• Learn the purpose for which the processed data is used,
• Exercise your legal rights.

sections.heading: 15. Policy Updates
sections.body: {{restaurantName}} may update this Privacy Policy when deemed necessary. The current version is always published on the website.

sections.heading: 16. Contact
sections.body: For questions about this policy or requests regarding your personal data, you can contact us through our contact page.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: Information about the cookies used on this website and their purposes.

sections.heading: 1. What Are Cookies?
sections.body: Cookies are small text files saved to your browser by the websites you visit. Through cookies, a website can recognize you on subsequent visits, remember your preferences, and provide a better user experience.

sections.heading: 2. Why Do We Use Cookies?
sections.body: The {{restaurantName}} website uses cookies to enhance the user experience, streamline the ordering process, ensure system security, and improve website performance.

sections.heading: 3. Types of Cookies Used
sections.body:
The following types of cookies may be used on our website:

• Strictly Necessary Cookies
• Performance Cookies
• Functionality Cookies
• Analytical Cookies

Advertising or targeting cookies are not used by default.

sections.heading: 4. Strictly Necessary Cookies
sections.body: These cookies are required for the basic functions of the website to operate. They enable core features such as secure session management, language preference, the ordering process, and QR Menu functionality.

sections.heading: 5. Performance Cookies
sections.body: Performance cookies may be used to anonymously analyze which pages of the website are visited most and how users interact with the system.

sections.heading: 6. Functionality Cookies
sections.body: These cookies remember personalization options such as language preference and user interface settings, providing a better experience on subsequent visits.

sections.heading: 7. Analytical Cookies
sections.body: Anonymous usage statistics may be collected to improve the website. This information does not directly identify any individual and is used solely to enhance service quality.

sections.heading: 8. Cookies Used During the Ordering Process
sections.body: Temporary cookies may be used in the online ordering and QR Menu system to preserve cart information, complete order steps securely, and maintain continuity of the user experience.

sections.heading: 9. Third-Party Services
sections.body: Some technical infrastructure or analytics services used on the website may create their own cookies. These cookies are subject to the privacy policies of the respective service providers.

sections.heading: 10. Cookie Retention Period
sections.body: Some cookies are stored only for the duration of a session, while others may be kept on your device for a specified period to remember your preferences. The retention period may vary depending on the purpose of the cookie.

sections.heading: 11. How Can You Manage Cookies?
sections.body: You can delete, block, or restrict cookie usage for specific websites through your browser settings. However, if some cookies are disabled, certain features of the website may not function as expected.

sections.heading: 12. Cookie Consent
sections.body: You can set your preferences through the cookie notice displayed during your first visit. Cookies other than strictly necessary cookies will only be used if you provide your consent.

sections.heading: 13. Policy Updates
sections.body: {{restaurantName}} may update this Cookie Policy in line with technical or legal requirements. The current version is always published on the website.

sections.heading: 14. Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about our Cookie Policy, you can contact us through our contact page.

deliveryReturn.title: Delivery and Return Policy
deliveryReturn.description: Information about the preparation, delivery, and return processes for online orders.

sections.heading: 1. General Information
sections.body: {{restaurantName}} aims to provide high-quality and reliable service to its customers. This policy has been prepared to provide information about the preparation and delivery of online orders and potential return processes.

sections.heading: 2. Service Areas
sections.body: Delivery service is only available within the areas served by the restaurant. Orders may not be accepted for addresses outside the delivery coverage area.

sections.heading: 3. Order Preparation Time
sections.body: Orders are prepared as quickly as possible depending on the restaurant's level of activity. The average preparation and delivery time may differ from the estimated times indicated on the order screen.

sections.heading: 4. Delivery Process
sections.body: Orders are delivered by restaurant staff or a contracted courier service. It is the customer's responsibility to ensure that the address information provided at the time of delivery is correct.

sections.heading: 5. Delivery Fee
sections.body: The delivery fee is clearly displayed to the customer during the ordering process. Free delivery may be available under certain promotional campaigns.

sections.heading: 6. Minimum Order Amount
sections.body: A minimum order amount may apply in some delivery areas. The current minimum order amount is indicated on the order screen.

sections.heading: 7. Checking Your Order
sections.body: It is recommended that you check the items before accepting your delivery. If a missing or incorrect item is identified, the restaurant should be contacted as soon as possible.

sections.heading: 8. Missing or Incorrect Items
sections.body: In the event of an incomplete order, incorrect item being sent, or an error caused by the restaurant, a review will be conducted and, where deemed appropriate, the item may be resent or a refund may be issued.

sections.heading: 9. Return Conditions
sections.body: Returns are generally not accepted for food items that have been prepared and delivered due to hygiene and food safety reasons. However, cases involving restaurant errors, missing items, or defective service will be assessed within the scope of applicable legislation.

sections.heading: 10. Order Cancellation
sections.body: You may request cancellation before preparation of the order has begun. Cancellation requests for orders that have already entered the preparation process are subject to the restaurant's discretion.

sections.heading: 11. Force Majeure
sections.body: In the event of adverse weather conditions, traffic, technical failures, official authority decisions, or extraordinary circumstances beyond the restaurant's control, delivery times may be extended or delivery may not be possible.

sections.heading: 12. Refunds
sections.body: If a refund decision is made, the refund will be processed according to the procedures of the relevant payment institution, depending on the payment method used.

sections.heading: 13. Customer Responsibility
sections.body: The customer is responsible for providing correct contact information, phone number, and delivery address when placing an order. The restaurant is not liable for delivery problems arising from incorrect or incomplete information provided by the customer.

sections.heading: 14. Contact
sections.body: For any questions or requests regarding delivery or return processes, you can contact {{restaurantName}} using the information provided on the contact page.

distanceSales.title: Distance Sales Agreement
distanceSales.description: Distance sales agreement regarding online ordering services.

sections.heading: 1. Parties
sections.body: This Distance Sales Agreement is entered into electronically between {{restaurantName}} and the customer placing an order through the website.

sections.heading: 2. Subject
sections.body: The subject of this agreement is the determination of the rights and obligations of the parties regarding the order placed by the customer through the website or QR Menu.

sections.heading: 3. Order Process
sections.body: Before completing their order, the customer is obligated to review the product information, prices, delivery fee, and total order amount. By confirming the order, the customer is deemed to have accepted the terms of the agreement.

sections.heading: 4. Product and Service Information
sections.body: The name, quantity, unit price, delivery fee, and total payment amount of the products subject to the order are clearly displayed on the order screen.

sections.heading: 5. Payment
sections.body: Payment is made using one of the payment methods offered during the ordering process. Security processes related to the payment infrastructure used are managed by the relevant payment institution.

sections.heading: 6. Delivery
sections.body: Orders are delivered to the specified address within the delivery areas served by the restaurant. Delivery time may vary depending on the restaurant's level of activity, traffic conditions, and other operational factors.

sections.heading: 7. Order Preparation
sections.body: The order is taken into the preparation process after customer confirmation. Requests for changes or cancellations for orders that have already begun preparation are subject to the restaurant's discretion.

sections.heading: 8. Right of Withdrawal
sections.body: Pursuant to Law No. 6502 on the Protection of Consumers and the relevant Distance Contracts Regulation, the right of withdrawal does not apply to food products that are perishable or may expire quickly.

sections.heading: 9. Return Conditions
sections.body: Returns are generally not accepted for food and beverage products that have been delivered, due to hygiene and food safety reasons. However, missing items, incorrect orders, or errors caused by the restaurant will be assessed and an appropriate solution will be provided.

sections.heading: 10. Customer Obligations
sections.body: The customer acknowledges that the information provided at the time of ordering is accurate and up to date. The restaurant is not liable for delays that may arise due to an incorrect address, missing contact information, or an unreachable phone number.

sections.heading: 11. Restaurant's Rights
sections.body: {{restaurantName}} reserves the right to cancel an order or contact the customer to offer an alternative solution in the event of technical failure, insufficient product stock, force majeure, or extraordinary circumstances that prevent the provision of service.

sections.heading: 12. Force Majeure
sections.body: In the event of natural disasters, severe weather conditions, war, official authority decisions, technical infrastructure problems, or events beyond the control of the parties, the parties shall not be held liable to the extent they are unable to fulfill their obligations.

sections.heading: 13. Protection of Personal Data
sections.body: Personal data shared during the ordering process is processed within the scope of the Privacy Policy and KVKK Disclosure Text.

sections.heading: 14. Dispute Resolution
sections.body: In the event of disputes arising from this agreement, applicable consumer legislation shall apply. Authorized Consumer Arbitration Committees and Consumer Courts shall have jurisdiction.

sections.heading: 15. Entry into Force
sections.body: By completing their order, the customer declares that they have read, understood, and accepted this Distance Sales Agreement in electronic form.

kvkk.title: KVKK Disclosure Text
kvkk.description: Information regarding the processing of your personal data within the scope of Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data.

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
sections.body: Within the scope of Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data ('KVKK'), {{restaurantName}} processes your personal data as the data controller to the extent described below.

sections.heading: 2. Personal Data Processed
sections.body:
Depending on the service provided, the following personal data may be processed:

• Name and surname
• Phone number
• Email address
• Delivery address
• Order information
• Reservation information
• Table number (for QR orders)
• Customer notes
• Payment information (excluding parts processed by the payment infrastructure)
• IP address, device information, and technical usage records

sections.heading: 3. Method of Personal Data Collection
sections.body: Your personal data is collected through automated or partially automated means via the website, QR Menu system, online order screen, reservation forms, contact forms, and electronic communication channels.

sections.heading: 4. Purposes of Personal Data Processing
sections.body:
The collected data may be processed for the following purposes:

• Creation of orders
• Order preparation and delivery
• Reservation management
• Providing customer support
• Order status notifications
• Improving service quality
• Ensuring security
• Fulfillment of legal obligations

sections.heading: 5. Legal Grounds
sections.body: Your personal data may be processed based on the legal grounds specified in Articles 5 and 6 of the KVKK, including the establishment and performance of a contract, fulfillment of legal obligations, legitimate interest, and explicit consent.

sections.heading: 6. Transfer of Data
sections.body: Your personal data may be shared with payment institutions, technical infrastructure providers, delivery services, official authorities, or legally authorized bodies only to the extent necessary for the provision of the service.

sections.heading: 7. Retention Period
sections.body: Personal data is retained only for as long as the processing purpose continues or for the period specified in applicable legislation. Upon expiry, it is securely deleted, anonymized, or destroyed.

sections.heading: 8. Data Security
sections.body: {{restaurantName}} applies up-to-date technical and administrative security measures to protect the confidentiality of personal data. Necessary precautions are taken to prevent unauthorized access, data loss, and misuse.

sections.heading: 9. Rights of the Data Subject
sections.body:
Within the scope of Article 11 of the KVKK, you have the right to:

• Learn whether your personal data is being processed,
• Request information if it has been processed,
• Learn the purpose of processing,
• Request correction of data,
• Request deletion or destruction,
• Request compensation for damages in the event of unlawful processing.

sections.heading: 10. Application Method
sections.body: You may submit your requests under the KVKK by contacting {{restaurantName}} in accordance with current legislation. Applications will be concluded as soon as possible and within the statutory timeframes.
